headlines.headline: Nolvis Devices files routine patent applications in supply chain optimization

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business operations and do not provide immediate or long-term financial impact.

headlines.headline: Halvix Holdings to host investor day focused on supply chain optimization strategy

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
